text.title: Retro Action Success Criteria Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree gating an action on (experiment specificity, threshold numericness, owner-role naming, S-deadline) — accept / repair / archive.

decision-tree.root-question: action.experiment is specific (>=20 chars, no 'communicate better')?

conclusion.verdict: repair: rewrite experiment as falsifiable hypothesis with named intervention
repair: derive numeric threshold tied to measurement_source
repair: assign named role + S-numbered sprint deadline

branch.question: same experiment recurred ≥ 3 retros without outcome?

conclusion.verdict: archive: experiment is folklore; remove from active set; document why
accept: commit action to next sprint with baseline + outcome review at deadline

text.example: experiment="Rotate PR-review-day Fri; cap WIP 5" → threshold="p95 4d→3d by S15" → owner=tech-lead, deadline=S15 → not recurring → accept.
